included: Private speed boat or seaplane transfers

itinerary.title: Arrival in the Maldives
itinerary.description: Arrive at Velana International Airport in Malé. Take a speed boat or a seaplane to your beautiful resort. Check in and enjoy a free welcome drink. Spend your day relaxing on the sandy beach or next to the pool. In the evening, enjoy a delicious dinner at the resort's beach restaurant.

itinerary.title: Water Sports and Local Island Visit
itinerary.description: Have a delicious breakfast at the resort. Spend your morning snorkeling or scuba diving to see colorful fish. Visit a nearby local island to learn about local culture. Return to the resort for lunch. In the afternoon, you can relax at the spa or rest on the beach. Enjoy an optional sunset cruise to see dolphins. Have a nice dinner with a cultural dance show.

itinerary.title: Relaxing Beach Day
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast at the resort. You can choose to go jet skiing, fishing, or diving. In the late afternoon, enjoy a peaceful yoga session as the sun sets. End your day with a special beach barbecue dinner under the stars.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Start your day with breakfast and check out of your room. Take a speed boat or a seaplane back to Malé airport. Board your flight back home with wonderful memories of your Maldives vacation.

title: Maldives Paradise Escape
description: Escape to the beautiful islands of the Maldives for a 4-day tropical vacation. Enjoy white sand beaches, clear blue waters, and relaxing resort stays. This tour is perfect for couples, families, and anyone looking for a peaceful holiday in nature.
highlights: Beach barbecue dinner under the stars
